title: Finn's Big Safari Adventure
synopsis: Little Finn goes on an exciting safari adventure where he meets friendly animals and learns about helping others in the savanna.

pages.text: Finn walked into the big savanna. The grass was tall and golden. "Wow!" said Finn. "This place is amazing!"

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes stands in tall golden grass in the savanna, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in warm orange and yellow tones
illustration.alt: Finn standing in tall golden savanna grass

pages.text: A big elephant came over to Finn. "Hello, little boy," said the elephant. "I'm Ella. Do you want to be friends?"

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes looking up at a friendly gray elephant with expressive eyes, painted in gouache with thick confident strokes and warm savanna colors

pages.text: "Yes!" said Finn. Then a tall giraffe walked up. "Hi, I'm Gary," said the giraffe. "Nice to meet you, Finn!"

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes standing between Ella the elephant and Gary the tall giraffe against an orange sunset sky, painted with textured gouache brushstrokes
illustration.alt: Finn with his new animal friends

pages.text: Suddenly, they heard crying. A baby lion was stuck in some thick bushes. "Help me!" cried the little lion.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, Ella the elephant, and Gary the giraffe looking at a small golden lion cub caught in green bushes, painted in gouache with bold strokes and warm colors
illustration.alt: Baby lion stuck in bushes while friends look on

pages.text: "Don't worry," said Finn. Gary used his long neck to pull away the branches. Ella used her trunk to lift the baby lion out safely.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes watches as Gary the giraffe and Ella the elephant work together to rescue the baby lion, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in golden grass under orange sunset
illustration.alt: The animals working together to rescue baby lion

pages.text: "Thank you!" said the baby lion. All the animals cheered. Finn smiled big. "I love adventures with friends!" he said happily.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes celebrating with Ella the elephant, Gary the giraffe, and the freed baby lion in the golden savanna grass, painted with expressive gouache in warm sunset colors
illustration.alt: All friends celebrating together in the savanna

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What color was the grass in the savanna?
questions.explanation: The grass was tall and golden in the savanna where Finn had his adventure.

questions.question: What was the elephant's name?
questions.explanation: The friendly elephant introduced herself as Ella to Finn.

questions.question: Who was stuck in the bushes?
questions.explanation: The baby lion got stuck in the thick bushes and called for help.

questions.question: How did the friends help the baby lion?
questions.explanation: Gary used his long neck and Ella used her trunk to work together and rescue the baby lion.
